send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

conversation.message_text: Fashion Nova: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Terms: http://sms.fashionnova.com/cl/Vbi Privacy: http://sms.fashionnova.com/cl/EzD
Fashion Nova: You made the FN list! Now, use code HOT to get 40% OFF the ENTIRE site! -> http://sms.fashionnova.com/ac1jtg_8fdwH

Fashion Nova: Hi there! Curious about a product or want to make a purchase? We're happy to provide more details or make recommendations!

Reply with any questions you have!
Fashion Nova: HURRY! Your coupon code expires soon! Tap this link to get 40% Off NOW! -> http://sms.fashionnova.com/aDRu-Jk4-Mgq .
Fashion Nova: HURRY! The items in your cart are selling fast! Take 40% off with code: HOT -> http://sms.fashionnova.com/aPhOrd0Id3Xg .

Fashion Nova: FINAL 6 HRS! 40% OFF EVERYTHING Ends TONIGHT!!

Shop Now, B4 This Summer SALE Is OVER! Use Code: HOT ->
http://sms.fashionnova.com/aW2StaqVpQpF .
Fashion Nova: HURRY! The items in your cart are selling fast! Take 40% off with code: HOT -> http://sms.fashionnova.com/aqIc9Zd94WbF .

Fashion Nova: Hi Tonya! Curious about a product or want to make a purchase? We're happy to provide more details or make recommendations!

Reply with any questions you have!

Wanted to make a purchase. Advertisement said everything 40% off.  However the 40% does not come off when attempting to check out.  Says that the code does not apply to item in your bag.  Is there a code you can give me to get the 40% off EVERYTHING?
Fashion Nova: Thank you for reaching out. I'm sorry to hear that. Can you please send a screenshot of your cart so I can check?
This is my cart and my email I received

Fashion Nova: Thanks so much for sharing the screenshot of your cart! I totally understand how frustrating it can be when a discount doesn't apply as expected!

I took a look, and it seems the 40% off promotion only applies to select items. You can find the eligible items here:
http://sms.fashionnova.com/aqRO1_Ty8OtA

If your items aren't included in that collection, the code unfortunately won't apply. If you have any more questions or need assistance in the meantime, feel free to reach out. Happy to help!
FALSE ADVERTISEMENT!!!!! ADD SAY 40% OFF EVERYTHING!!! THANKS FOR NOTHING

Fashion Nova: I completely understand how that could be a letdown, and I'm really sorry for the inconvenience. While the ad did mention it's 40% off everything, our promos do come with terms and conditions, which means some exclusions may apply. I know that's ideal, and feedback from our customers is really valuable for us and helps us constantly improve. I'll definitely pass this along to the team for you, and thanks so much for your feedback! In the meantime, you can find our promo terms and conditions here: http://sms.fashionnova.com/aXvS3bPxrpa6

SHEEX: Hey Megan, this is Jordan. Thanks for checking out our site! https://sheex.attn.tv/a0DBGUAbg0es 

Any questions I can answer for you?
I have an order I placed on Jan 4 and still have not received it .
SHEEX: I'm sorry for the trouble. I've checked the tracking, and it seems that UPS hasn't scanned the package yet. I'll check this with our team and get back to you as soon as possible, hang tight!
I did receive the Ecru duvet this week . I have not received the Graphite duvet cover
SHEEX: No worries. I see it's already shipped with UPS. Here's the tracking link https://sheex.attn.tv/aoe91o1eea58 I'd recommend reaching out to them for more info on the status.
Is this the Graphite Duvet cover order?
SHEEX: Sorry for the confusion. That's the sheet set. As for the duvet cover, I'm still waiting to hear back from the team. I'll be in touch once I have an update.
I already received the sheet set this week.
I need an update son the Graphite Duvet. Thank you
SHEEX: Great! Thank you for letting me know. Your concern for order SH-609112 is still being reviewed by our team. I'll text you as soon as I hear back from them.
Thank you
SHEEX: You're welcome! It's a little late, so it's likely I won't hear back by today, though rest assured, I'll reach out once business hours resume. Have a great night!
Thank you
Do we have a status update on the shipping of this order?
SHEEX: Thank you for reaching out! I apologize, but I haven't heard back from the team yet. I'll keep you updated as soon as I receive any information. Thank you for your patience.

SHEEX: Over $400,000 in new markdowns taken!

Enjoy 20% off sitewide with tons of clearance deals up to 75% off.

Shop now: sheex.attn.tv/anvJ0XyWs896
Do you have an update on this order?
SHEEX: I'm sorry for the delay. I haven't heard from the team yet, but I have sent another follow-up. I'll be in touch.
I placed this order on Jan 4th. This has been ridiculous and no follow up. I should be sent another order immediately if this one is no t known. I should also be refuneded the money

SHEEX: I get where you're coming from because I'm a consumer, too and I'm sorry this didn't go as expected. I've sent another notification to the team and asked them if they can prioritize your concern. I will be sure to text you as soon as they provide an update.

Alternatively, you can also give us a call at 1 (856) 334-3021 (Monday-Friday, 8am-6pm EST) for faster asssitance from the team.
I just called customer service and they say you have to leave a message and get back to you in a day. This is getting ridiculous. I would like someone to call me today.
SHEEX: I'm really sorry for the frustration this has caused. Rest assured that a member of our team will be calling you back today to assist you directly. I appreciate your patience.
I left a message today and did not get a call back. I would like an update on my order .

SHEEX: Sorry for the lack of an update, and I understand. Unfortunately, I'm still waiting for an update from my team. Rest assured, I'll let you know once I hear back from them. Thank you for extending your patience with us.
There is no reason it should take 2 days to get an update. If a new order needs to be shipped, why has that not happened?

SHEEX: Apologies for the long wait. My team is dealing with an influx of support messages, but they are doing everything to respond to each inquiry in a timely manner. We will follow up with you in no time!
It has been several business days with no follow up call. I would like a call TODAY.
SHEEX: Sorry about that. Unfortunately, I can't guarantee an immediate response today. Rest assured, I'll let you know once I hear back from them. Your understanding is greatly appreciated.
Your voicemail says in one business day . It has been weeks. I will be placing a formal complaint within hours. Please advise and call immediately

SHEEX: I understand how frustrating this must be, and I'm truly sorry for the inconvenience. Another way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@sheex.com. Our team is happy to help!
I have done that and no response
SHEEX: I'm sorry to hear that. We are currently experiencing high email volume, but rest assured, once our team sees your concern, they will assist you immediately. I apologize for the inconvenience.

SHEEX: Winter favorites are going fast! Enjoy 20% off sitewide & select styles up to 75% off while supplies last.

Hurry! Shop now: sheex.attn.tv/a8v98HLoJ7sJ
I would like to be triaged to a manager immediately. I have texted 20 times, sent 4 email and 4 phone calls with no response. This is ridiculous and I would like my shipment delivered.

SHEEX: I'm sorry for the frustration this situation has caused, and I understand how concerning it is not to receive timely responses. I will request an immediate follow up, so this can be reviewed with priority. Thank you for your patience, and I will make sure this is addressed as quickly as possible.
You did that last week. I would like a call TODAY. I had never worked with a company so negligent. I will be filing a complaint with the Better Business Bureau today if I do not.

SHEEX: I'm really sorry for the inconvenience. You can give us a call at 1 (856) 334-3021 (Monday-Friday, 8am-6pm EST) and our team is happy to help.

conversation.message_text: Critics' Choice Video: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Critics' Choice Video: Welcome! This is Jordan, your personal Concierge. 

Your code is CCV10. Use it at checkout for 10% off your order! Shop now: https://criticschoice.attn.tv/aXIFGqdNLR_f 

Anything I can help you with?
How do I pay and check out
Critics' Choice Video: Please click on the cart icon in the top right to proceed to checkout. Let me know how that goes!
Okay
Just fine when will my order arrive?

Critics' Choice Video: Great! We usually ship via USPS, and once shipped, it will take 3-10 business days for domestic orders. You'll get a tracking email as soon as your order ships. If you don't see it in your inbox, be sure to check your spam and promo folders; sometimes our emails end up there as well.
Okay, will do
Critics' Choice Video: Thank you! In the meantime, is there anything else I can help you with?
No, it's fine
Critics' Choice Video: Got it! Feel free to reach out anytime, I'm always here to help!

Critics' Choice Video: Criterion Collection Films now on Sale! Shop now, limited time only! criticschoice.attn.tv/aHSeIspHGG5G 

Text STOP to opt out.
When my previous order be delivered

Critics' Choice Video: Thank you for reaching out! We usually ship via USPS and once shipped it will take 3-10 business days for domestic orders. Once your order ships, you will be sent tracking info. Please check your spam and promo folders as well, as our emails sometimes end up there.
Thank you

Critics' Choice Video: You're welcome! Have a great day and if you have any questions, feel free to send me a text. Do check out our bestsellers here: https://criticschoice.attn.tv/aFzPk8eRZEm3 , https://criticschoice.attn.tv/aFEEHg94MvfT , https://criticschoice.attn.tv/aL1x7arBt23P

Critics' Choice Video: Box Sets are back! Grab your favorite Paramount movies, series, & more on sale now. Treat yourself! criticschoice.attn.tv/a-5mMTPN3BjN 

Text STOP to opt out.
Did you receive my payment on my order I'm having trouble with my bank

Critics' Choice Video: Thanks for reaching out, and sorry for the trouble! I'm afraid I'm not seeing any active or pending orders on my end. That most likely means that the order or payment hasn't gone through. Do you see a charge on your account? If so, is it pending or posted?
It might be pending

Critics' Choice Video: Thanks for letting me know! If you didn't receive a confirmation email, your order may not have gone through. If the charge on your account is still showing as pending, it means the payment hasn't been completed yet. It should either be refunded within 24 - 48 hours or go through successfully. If it's refunded, you can try placing the order again. If it processes, you'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
I can't find the app I want to order the God father and Good Santa
Can you send me the app to re order

Critics' Choice Video: I'm really sorry for the trouble! I'm afraid we don't currently have an app. You can place your order here: https://criticschoice.attn.tv/aAUurKHWXMng. Also, are you referring to Bad Santa? https://criticschoice.attn.tv/aSPLUOMK8oAN
How do I check out

Critics' Choice Video: After adding items to your cart, click the cart icon on the upper right side of our website. There, you can see a button prompting you to proceed to checkout! Let me know how that goes, I'll be here if you have any questions.
Ok ty

Critics' Choice Video: You're welcome! Have a great day and if you have any questions, feel free to send me a text. While I have you, you can take a peek at our Specials & Sales! You might find something extra special here: https://criticschoice.attn.tv/aqEWXgFdWWhk
I was almost there and it disappeared

Critics' Choice Video: Sorry about that! Sometimes the cart can reset if the page refreshes or the session times out. Please try logging back in and re-adding your items, and it should hold steady through checkout. If it happens again, I'll be here to help troubleshoot.
Ty
Critics' Choice Video: You're welcome! I'll be here if you run into any more issues.
My payment went through did it go through on your end

Critics' Choice Video: Sorry, I don't see any recent orders on my end. To be sure, could you please check if you received a confirmation email or a charge on your account? Be sure to also check your spam and promotions folders for the email.

If you do see a charge on your account, please let me know whether it's still pending or has posted so we can guide you on the next steps.
It's pending as of today

Critics' Choice Video: Thanks for letting me know. If you didn't receive a confirmation email, your order may not have gone through. If the charge on your account is still showing as pending, it means the payment hasn't been completed yet. It should either be refunded within 24 - 48 hours or go through successfully. If it's refunded, you can try placing the order again. If it processes, you'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
Thank you so much
May I ask to whom I'm speaking with?
Critics' Choice Video: My name is Jordan; I'm part of the support team at Critic's Choice Video. Is there anything else that I can do for you today?
No
Thank you so much!

Critics' Choice Video: It's the least I could do! If you're interested, you can check out our best sellers here: https://criticschoice.attn.tv/aA5KJ2dECU7h
Have a great day, and if you have any questions feel free to reach out!
Sure!
Hi I just re did my order have you received payment?

Critics' Choice Video: Thanks for checking! If you placed the order successfully, you should've received a confirmation email with your order number. If you don't see it in your inbox, be sure to check your spam and promo folders; sometimes our emails end up there as well. Let me know if there's anything else I can help you with.
Will do!
Thank you
Critics' Choice Video: No worries! Let me know how that goes. I'm just one click away!
Will do!
I went to secure check out and re did everything
I checked my email I no notification
Critics' Choice Video: Thanks for letting me know. If you don't see the confirmation email in your inbox, be sure to check your spam and promo folders; sometimes our emails end up there as well.
Will do!
How do I go to my spam folder?

Critics' Choice Video: Your spam folder is typically found in the left-hand menu of your email, often under a "More" option. To find it, open your email, and look for the sidebar or menu on the left. If you don't see it, click "More" or expand the list of labels to find the "Spam" folder. Let me know how it goes!
Okay!
Thanks found it said empty so I will try that
I did so just now so I'll keep checking spam and email thanks

If the charge on your account is still showing as pending, it means the payment hasn't been completed yet. It should either be refunded within 24 - 48 hours or go through successfully.
